title: aldrovanda vesiculosa var. verticillata
intro: Aldrovanda vesiculosa var. verticillata, also known as the waterwheel plant or carnivorous waterwheel plant, is a carnivorous aquatic plant belonging to the Droseraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aldrovanda vesiculosa var. verticillata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
